title: August 28
content:
<noinclude>{{Top|real|nocat=1}}
{{Month|August}}

'''August 28''' is the 240th day of the year (241st in leap years), with 125 days remaining.</noinclude>

*[[1940s#1948|1948]] – [[Vonda N. McIntyre]] is born.
*[[1950s#1951|1951]] – [[Barbara Hambly]] is born.
*[[1960s#1969|1969]] – [[Jack Black]] is born.
*1969 – [[Shannon McRandle]] is born.
*[[1973]] – [[Kirby Morrow]] is born.
*[[1975]] – [[Eugene Byrd]] is born.
*1975 – [[Jade Raymond]] is born.
*[[1979]] – [[Star Wars (1977) 29|''Star Wars'' (1977) 29]] is published.
*[[1980]] – [[The Empire Strikes Back Weekly 131|''The Empire Strikes Back Weekly'' 131]] published.
*[[2002]] – [[Star Wars Infinities: The Empire Strikes Back 2|''Star Wars Infinities: The Empire Strikes Back'' 2]] published.
*2002 – [[The Official Star Wars Fact File 35|''The Official Star Wars Fact File'' 35]] published.
*[[2007]] – ''[[Legacy of the Force: Inferno]]'' published.
*[[2013]] – [[Legacy (2013) 6|''Legacy'' (2013) 6]] published.
*[[2019]] – [[Age of Resistance - General Hux 1|''Age of Resistance - General Hux'' 1]] published.
*2019 – [[Galaxy's Edge 5|''Galaxy's Edge'' 5]] published.
*2019 – ''[[Marvel Comics 1000]]'' published.
*2019 – [[Age of Resistance - Poe Dameron 1|''Age of Resistance - Poe Dameron'' 1]] published.
*[[2024]] – [[Ahsoka 2|''Ahsoka'' 2]] published.
